criteria.name: Keeps state diagram type
criteria.description: Repairs the diagram as stateDiagram-v2 rather than switching diagram types.

criteria.name: Fixes missing transition label colon
criteria.description: Adds the missing colon before the approve label or otherwise makes that transition valid Mermaid.

criteria.name: Preserves lifecycle semantics
criteria.description: Keeps Draft, In Review, Published, submit, approve, and changes requested semantics.

criteria.name: Explains smallest repair
criteria.description: Explains the minimal syntax change without unrelated rewrites.
